schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmCapability
schemas.description: Device-level audio.algorithm capability summary.

fields.name: configSchemaVersion
fields.description: Version of the audio algorithm configuration schema exposed by the device.

fields.name: updatePolicy
fields.description: Update and atomicity policy for set and reset operations.

fields.name: supportedAlgorithms
fields.description: Optional compact list of supported algorithm object names.

schemas.name: AudioGetAlgorithmCapabilitiesRequest
schemas.description: Optional selector for querying audio algorithm capabilities.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Optional algorithm object names; omit to query all supported algorithms.

schemas.name: AudioGetAlgorithmConfigRequest
schemas.description: Optional selector for querying current audio algorithm configuration.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Optional algorithm object names; omit to query all supported algorithms.

schemas.name: AudioSetAlgorithmConfigRequest
schemas.description: Partial audio algorithm configuration update.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Partial configuration keyed by algorithm object name.

schemas.name: AudioResetAlgorithmConfigRequest
schemas.description: Selector for resetting audio algorithm configuration to defaults.

fields.name: items
fields.description: JSON reset selector: the string all, an array of algorithm object names, or a map from algorithm names to field-name arrays.

schemas.name: AudioSetAlgorithmConfigResponse
schemas.description: Result of a successful set or reset operation.

fields.name: applyState
fields.description: Apply state; values are applied or pending_restart.

fields.name: requiresAudioRestart
fields.description: Whether the change requires restarting the audio link or rebuilding the audio pipeline.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Final effective configuration for the algorithms affected by this operation.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Payload emitted when audio algorithm configuration changes.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; values include user_request, reset_to_default, factory_reset, profile_changed, device_policy, restore_config, and unknown.

fields.name: applyState
fields.description: Apply state; values are applied or pending_restart.

fields.name: requiresAudioRestart
fields.description: Whether the change requires restarting the audio link or rebuilding the audio pipeline.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Changed or affected algorithm configuration values.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Optional changed field paths such as noiseSuppression.level.

schemas.name: AudioGetAlgorithmCapabilitiesResponse
schemas.description: Supported algorithm objects, fields, defaults, ranges, units, and update policy.

fields.name: updatePolicy
fields.description: Update and atomicity policy for set and reset operations.

fields.name: algorithms
fields.description: Capability descriptors keyed by algorithm object name.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmUpdatePolicy
schemas.description: Audio algorithm update and atomicity policy.

fields.name: partialUpdateSupported
fields.description: Whether clients may send only the fields they want to modify.

fields.name: multiAlgorithmUpdateSupported
fields.description: Whether one request may update multiple algorithm objects.

fields.name: atomicUpdateSupported
fields.description: Whether set and reset operations are applied atomically.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmCapabilities
schemas.description: Capability descriptors for audio algorithm objects.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmPropertyCapability
schemas.description: Descriptor for one algorithm configuration property.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Property type; values include boolean, enum, uint8, uint16, uint32, int32, float, string, object, and array.

fields.name: defaultBool
fields.description: Boolean default value when type is boolean.

fields.name: defaultEnum
fields.description: Enum default value when type is enum.

fields.name: defaultInt32
fields.description: Numeric default value for integer-backed properties.

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit such as ms, dB, or degree.

fields.name: requiresAudioRestart
fields.description: Whether modifying this field requires restarting the audio link or rebuilding the audio pipeline.

schemas.name: AudioNoiseSuppressionCapabilities
schemas.description: Noise suppression supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioEchoCancellationCapabilities
schemas.description: Echo cancellation supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioAutoGainControlCapabilities
schemas.description: Automatic gain control supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioBeamformingCapabilities
schemas.description: Beamforming supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioDereverberationCapabilities
schemas.description: Dereverberation supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioVoiceActivityDetectionCapabilities
schemas.description: Voice activity detection supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioDirectionOfArrivalCapabilities
schemas.description: Direction of arrival supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioHowlingSuppressionCapabilities
schemas.description: Howling suppression supported fields.

schemas.name: AudioAlgorithmConfig
schemas.description: Audio algorithm configuration keyed by algorithm object name.

schemas.name: AudioNoiseSuppressionConfig
schemas.description: Noise suppression configuration object.

schemas.name: AudioEchoCancellationConfig
schemas.description: Echo cancellation configuration object.

fields.name: tailLengthMs
fields.description: Echo tail length in milliseconds; modifying it may require restarting the audio link.

schemas.name: AudioAutoGainControlConfig
schemas.description: Automatic gain control configuration object.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether automatic gain control is enabled.

schemas.name: AudioBeamformingConfig
schemas.description: Beamforming configuration object.

fields.name: lookDirectionDeg
fields.description: Fixed beam look direction in degrees.

schemas.name: AudioDereverberationConfig
schemas.description: Dereverberation configuration object.

schemas.name: AudioVoiceActivityDetectionConfig
schemas.description: Voice activity detection configuration object.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether voice activity detection is enabled.

schemas.name: AudioDirectionOfArrivalConfig
schemas.description: Direction of arrival configuration object.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether direction of arrival estimation is enabled.

fields.name: reportingEnabled
fields.description: Whether DOA or beam result reporting is enabled by this configuration.

schemas.name: AudioHowlingSuppressionConfig
schemas.description: Howling suppression configuration object.

schemas.name: AudioGetStreamCapabilitiesParams
schemas.description: Selector for real-time audio stream capability.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Optional audio source identifier; omit to query all visible sources.

fields.name: includeRuntimeState
fields.description: Whether to include current source runtime state.

schemas.name: AudioStreamCapabilities
schemas.description: Device-level audio.stream capability summary.

fields.name: openModes
fields.description: Supported open modes, such as producer_open and receiver_pull.

fields.name: peerRoles
fields.description: Peer roles, such as receiver and transmitter.

fields.name: supportsSyncGroup
fields.description: Whether audio streams can share a synchronization group with video streams.

fields.name: flowControlManagedByRuntime
fields.description: Whether normal applications can rely on runtime-managed STREAM flow control.

fields.name: aacTransportFormats
fields.description: Optional AAC transport format strings; exact supported set remains product-confirmed.

schemas.name: AudioStreamSource
schemas.description: One real-time audio stream source.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Runtime source state, such as available, receiving, stopped, or unavailable.

schemas.name: AudioOpenStreamParams
schemas.description: Request to open a real-time audio stream.

fields.name: peerRole
fields.description: Requested peer media role; values include receiver and transmitter.

fields.name: codec
fields.description: Requested audio codec, such as aac, opus, or pcm.

fields.name: transportFormat
fields.description: Optional codec transport format, such as adts, latm, or raw_aac.

fields.name: cursorUnit
fields.description: STREAM cursor unit, such as timestampUs or sampleIndex.

fields.name: maxDataSize
fields.description: Preferred maximum STREAM payload data size.

schemas.name: AudioOpenStreamResult
schemas.description: Result of opening a real-time audio stream.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Initial state, normally opening or streaming.

fields.name: maxDataSize
fields.description: Negotiated maximum STREAM payload data size.

schemas.name: AudioCloseStreamParams
schemas.description: Request to close an audio stream.

schemas.name: AudioCloseStreamResult
schemas.description: Result of closing an audio stream.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Close state, such as closing, closed, or failed.

fields.name: alreadyClosed
fields.description: Whether the stream was already terminal before this request.

schemas.name: AudioGetStreamStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for an audio stream state query.

schemas.name: AudioStreamState
schemas.description: Runtime state of one audio stream.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Stream state, such as opening, streaming, closing, closed, or failed.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: Failure reason when state is failed.

schemas.name: AudioGetStreamSourceStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for audio source runtime state.

schemas.name: AudioStreamSourceState
schemas.description: Runtime state of an audio stream source.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Source state, such as unavailable, available, receiving, stopped, or failed.

fields.name: available
fields.description: Whether the source is available for openStream.

fields.name: activeStreamId
fields.description: Active downstream stream id, if any.

schemas.name: AudioStreamStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for audio stream state changes.

schemas.name: AudioStreamSourceStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for audio stream source state changes.

fields.name: activeStreamId
fields.description: Active downstream stream id, if any.

schemas.name: AudioStreamStatsReportedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for audio stream statistics reports.

schemas.name: AudioStreamStats
schemas.description: Bounded runtime statistics for an audio stream.

fields.name: bytes
fields.description: Number of STREAM payload bytes observed.

schemas.name: CastSourceSummary
schemas.description: Summary of a cast source device or local AXTP sender.

fields.name: address
fields.description: Network or transport address summary when safe to expose.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol path that produced the source summary.

schemas.name: CastMediaSummary
schemas.description: Low-frequency media summary for a cast session.

fields.name: firstFrame
fields.description: Whether the first visible frame has rendered.

fields.name: audioActive
fields.description: Whether local receiver audio output is active.

schemas.name: CastLastError
schemas.description: Redactable backend or receiver error summary.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable error summary suitable for authorized clients.

fields.name: occurredAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the error was observed.

fields.name: redacted
fields.description: Whether sensitive details were removed from this summary.

schemas.name: CastGetSessionParams
schemas.description: Selector for cast receiver and active session summary.

fields.name: include
fields.description: Optional summary sections, such as source, media, or airPlayName.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Optional receiver-local session id to query.

schemas.name: CastSessionState
schemas.description: Current receiver phase and active session state.

fields.name: receiverPhase
fields.description: Protocol-neutral receiver phase used by UI and reconnection calibration.

fields.name: sessionState
fields.description: AirPlay or backend-specific session state detail.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Cast protocol path currently represented by this state.

fields.name: airPlayName
fields.description: Current published AirPlay receiver display name.

fields.name: authRequired
fields.description: Whether this session path currently requires authentication.

schemas.name: CastStopSessionParams
schemas.description: Request to stop an active cast session.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Optional receiver-local session id; omitted means current active session.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Caller-visible reason for stopping the session.

fields.name: force
fields.description: Whether the receiver may force backend/session cleanup.

schemas.name: CastStopSessionResult
schemas.description: Result of a cast session stop request.

fields.name: accepted
fields.description: Whether the receiver accepted the stop request.

fields.name: previousReceiverPhase
fields.description: Receiver phase before the stop transition.

fields.name: receiverPhase
fields.description: Receiver phase after accepting the stop request.

fields.name: previousState
fields.description: Backend-specific state before the stop transition.

fields.name: sessionState
fields.description: Backend-specific state after accepting the stop request.

fields.name: noActiveSession
fields.description: Whether no active session existed when the request was processed.

schemas.name: CastSetAirPlayNameParams
schemas.description: Request to set the AirPlay receiver display name.

schemas.name: CastAirPlayNameState
schemas.description: AirPlay display name and backend publish state.

fields.name: previousDisplayName
fields.description: Previous display name when a change was applied.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source of the current display name.

fields.name: apply
fields.description: Apply timing used for the latest update.

fields.name: publishState
fields.description: Bonjour or backend service publish state.

fields.name: backendType
fields.description: Backend that owns the published name.

schemas.name: CastSessionIncomingEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for a new incoming cast session.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Receiver-local session id assigned to the incoming session.

fields.name: receiverPhase
fields.description: Receiver phase entered for the incoming session.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol path used by the incoming session.

fields.name: authRequired
fields.description: Whether this incoming session requires authentication.

fields.name: incomingAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the incoming session was observed.

schemas.name: CastSessionStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for receiver phase or backend session state changes.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol path represented by this event.

fields.name: authRequired
fields.description: Whether the current session phase requires authentication.

fields.name: media
fields.description: Low-frequency media summary at the time of transition.

schemas.name: CastSessionStartedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for a user-visible cast session start.

fields.name: receiverPhase
fields.description: Receiver phase after first visible frame or local playback starts.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol path represented by the started session.

fields.name: startedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the session became user-visible.

schemas.name: CastSessionStoppedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for a stopped cast session.

fields.name: backendType
fields.description: Backend type associated with the stopped session.

fields.name: stoppedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the stop was observed.

schemas.name: CastSessionFailedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for cast session failure.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Receiver-local failed session id when assigned.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol path represented by the failed session.

fields.name: failedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the failure was observed.

schemas.name: CastGetAudioParams
schemas.description: Selector for local cast audio state.

fields.name: includeEffective
fields.description: Whether to include effective local playback state.

schemas.name: CastSetAudioParams
schemas.description: Request to enable or disable local cast audio playback.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether local receiver playback is enabled.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: State target hint; this is not an authorization scope.

schemas.name: CastSetMutedParams
schemas.description: Request to mute or unmute local cast audio output.

fields.name: muted
fields.description: Whether local receiver output is muted.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: State target hint; this is not an authorization scope.

schemas.name: CastAudioState
schemas.description: Local cast audio playback and mute state.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether local receiver playback is enabled.

fields.name: muted
fields.description: Whether local receiver output is muted.

fields.name: effectivePlayback
fields.description: Whether audio is effectively playing locally after state and session conditions are applied.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: State target hint represented by this snapshot.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Receiver-local session id for session-specific state.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source of the latest state value.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by the latest operation or event.

schemas.name: CastAudioChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for local cast audio state changes.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by this event.

schemas.name: CastGetPinCodeConfigParams
schemas.description: Selector for cast PIN protection configuration.

fields.name: includeSecret
fields.description: Whether authorized clients request plaintext PIN material.

schemas.name: CastSetPinCodeConfigParams
schemas.description: Request to update cast PIN protection configuration.

fields.name: pinDisplay
fields.description: Where the current PIN may be displayed.

fields.name: rotatePin
fields.description: Whether the receiver should rotate or regenerate the PIN.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Visibility policy for responses and events.

schemas.name: CastSetPinCodeParams
schemas.description: Request to set the active cast PIN value.

fields.name: pinCode
fields.description: Opaque PIN value; concrete format is backend or product policy.

fields.name: expirePrevious
fields.description: Whether prior PIN material should stop being accepted.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Visibility policy for the new PIN.

schemas.name: CastPinCodeConfig
schemas.description: Cast PIN protection state and optional plaintext PIN value.

fields.name: pinCode
fields.description: Plaintext PIN value when visible to the caller.

fields.name: pinDisplay
fields.description: Where the current PIN may be displayed.

fields.name: generatedBy
fields.description: Component or actor that generated the current PIN.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Visibility policy for the PIN value.

fields.name: redactionRequired
fields.description: Whether logs, diagnostics, and error summaries must redact the PIN.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by the latest operation or event.

fields.name: redacted
fields.description: Whether sensitive fields were withheld in this snapshot.

schemas.name: CastPinCodeChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for PIN configuration or PIN state changes.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by this event.

schemas.name: CastPinCodeRequiredEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for a session waiting for PIN authentication.

fields.name: pinCode
fields.description: Plaintext PIN value when visible to the event subscriber.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Visibility policy for this event payload.

fields.name: redactionRequired
fields.description: Whether logs and diagnostics must redact this PIN value.

fields.name: requestedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when PIN input was requested.

schemas.name: CastPinCodeAuthFailedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for failed PIN authentication.

fields.name: attemptCount
fields.description: Attempt count visible to the receiver.

schemas.name: CastRect
schemas.description: Cast window rectangle in screen coordinates.

schemas.name: CastSetWindowStateParams
schemas.description: Request to update cast window state.

fields.name: fullscreen
fields.description: Whether the cast window should be fullscreen.

fields.name: alwaysOnTop
fields.description: Whether the cast window should stay above normal windows.

schemas.name: CastWindowState
schemas.description: Cast window visibility, mode, and bounds state.

fields.name: hasWindow
fields.description: Whether a cast window currently exists.

fields.name: visible
fields.description: Whether the cast window is visible.

fields.name: fullscreen
fields.description: Whether the cast window is fullscreen.

fields.name: alwaysOnTop
fields.description: Whether the cast window is topmost.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Receiver-local session id associated with the window.

fields.name: previousNormalBounds
fields.description: Normal-mode bounds recorded before fullscreen or topmost mode.

fields.name: restoredBounds
fields.description: Bounds restored by the latest transition.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by the latest operation or event.

schemas.name: CastWindowChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for cast window state changes.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by this event.

schemas.name: CastGetBackendStatusParams
schemas.description: Selector for cast backend status.

fields.name: includeLastError
fields.description: Whether to include the last backend error summary.

schemas.name: CastRestartBackendParams
schemas.description: Request to restart the cast backend.

fields.name: force
fields.description: Whether the backend adapter may force cleanup before restart.

schemas.name: CastBackendStatus
schemas.description: Cast backend state, process summary, discoverability, and last error.

fields.name: discoverable
fields.description: Whether the cast service is discoverable by sources.

fields.name: activeSessionId
fields.description: Active cast session id currently owned by the backend.

fields.name: restartInProgress
fields.description: Whether a backend restart is currently in progress.

fields.name: lastError
fields.description: Last backend error summary when requested and available.

schemas.name: CastRestartBackendResult
schemas.description: Result of requesting a cast backend restart.

fields.name: accepted
fields.description: Whether the receiver accepted the restart request.

fields.name: backendType
fields.description: Backend implementation affected by the restart.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Backend state after accepting the restart request.

fields.name: activeSessionEnded
fields.description: Whether an active cast session was ended by the restart.

fields.name: sessionStopReason
fields.description: Session stop reason reported for the ended session.

fields.name: estimatedReadyInMs
fields.description: Estimated backend recovery time in milliseconds.

schemas.name: CastBackendChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for cast backend state changes.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by this event.

fields.name: restartId
fields.description: Restart operation id when this event is restart-related.

fields.name: activeSessionEnded
fields.description: Whether this backend change ended an active session.

fields.name: endedSessionId
fields.description: Session ended by this backend change.

schemas.name: CastGetFlowControlStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for cast receiver flow control state.

fields.name: includeStats
fields.description: Whether to include low-frequency diagnostic counters.

fields.name: includePolicy
fields.description: Whether to include current flow policy fields.

schemas.name: CastSetRenderFpsParams
schemas.description: Request to set receiver-local target render fps.

fields.name: fps
fields.description: Target local render fps; zero means uncapped.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: State target hint; this is not an authorization scope.

schemas.name: CastSetFlowPolicyParams
schemas.description: Request to update receiver-local queue, late-frame, drop, and overlay policy.

fields.name: overlayEnabled
fields.description: Whether receiver diagnostics overlay is enabled.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: State target hint; this is not an authorization scope.

schemas.name: CastFlowControlState
schemas.description: Receiver-local cast flow control policy and low-frequency statistics.

fields.name: targetRenderFps
fields.description: Configured target render fps; zero means uncapped.

fields.name: audioQueueDepth
fields.description: Current queued audio frame depth when known.

fields.name: keyframeRequestCount
fields.description: Internal keyframe requests triggered by receiver policy.

fields.name: keyFrameOnDropBurst
fields.description: Whether the receiver may internally request a keyframe after a drop burst.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed by the latest operation or event.

schemas.name: CastFlowControlChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for cast flow control changes or low-frequency diagnostic samples.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Field names changed or sampled by this event.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Flow control state after the change or sample.

schemas.name: CastGetStatusParams
schemas.description: Selector for aggregate cast receiver status.

fields.name: includeSensitive
fields.description: Whether authorized callers request sensitive summary fields.

schemas.name: CastReceiverSummary
schemas.description: Aggregate receiver role and protocol-neutral phase summary.

fields.name: protocols
fields.description: Supported or active cast protocol paths.

schemas.name: CastSessionStatusSummary
schemas.description: Aggregate active session summary for status views.

fields.name: protocol
fields.description: Protocol path represented by the active session.

schemas.name: CastPinCodeStatusSummary
schemas.description: Aggregate PIN summary for status views.

fields.name: pinDisplay
fields.description: Where the current PIN may be displayed.

fields.name: pinCode
fields.description: Plaintext PIN value when visible to the caller.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Visibility policy applied to this summary.

schemas.name: CastStatus
schemas.description: Low-frequency aggregate cast receiver status.

fields.name: redacted
fields.description: Whether any sensitive aggregate fields were withheld.

schemas.name: CastStatusChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for low-frequency aggregate status changes.

fields.name: changedSections
fields.description: Status section names changed by this event.

schemas.name: CastSessionCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.session.

fields.name: protocols
fields.description: Cast protocol paths represented by the receiver.

fields.name: supportsAirPlayName
fields.description: Whether AirPlay display name query and update are supported.

fields.name: supportsStopSession
fields.description: Whether active cast sessions can be stopped through cast.stopSession.

fields.name: backendTypes
fields.description: Backend implementations represented by this receiver.

schemas.name: CastAudioCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.audio.

fields.name: defaultEnabled
fields.description: Default local playback enablement for received cast audio.

fields.name: supportsMute
fields.description: Whether local mute state can be controlled separately.

fields.name: reportsEffectivePlayback
fields.description: Whether the receiver reports effective local playback state.

schemas.name: CastPinCodeCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.pinCode.

fields.name: defaultEnabled
fields.description: Whether PIN protection is enabled by default.

fields.name: supportsPlaintextResponse
fields.description: Whether authorized responses or events may carry plaintext PIN values.

fields.name: supportedPinDisplays
fields.description: PIN display policies supported by the receiver.

fields.name: supportsGeneratedPin
fields.description: Whether the receiver can generate a default PIN.

fields.name: redactionRequired
fields.description: Whether logs, diagnostics, and error summaries must redact PIN values.

schemas.name: CastWindowCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.window.

fields.name: supportsFullscreen
fields.description: Whether fullscreen window mode is supported.

fields.name: supportsAlwaysOnTop
fields.description: Whether topmost window state is supported.

fields.name: supportsNormalRestore
fields.description: Whether normal mode can restore previous normal bounds.

fields.name: noWindowPolicy
fields.description: Receiver policy when a window command is received without an active cast window.

schemas.name: CastBackendCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.backend.

fields.name: backendTypes
fields.description: Backend implementations controlled by the receiver.

fields.name: reportsProcess
fields.description: Whether backend process metadata such as pid may be reported.

fields.name: supportsLastError
fields.description: Whether last backend error summaries are available.

schemas.name: CastFlowControlCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.flowControl.

fields.name: supportsRenderFps
fields.description: Whether receiver-local target render fps can be controlled.

fields.name: supportsQueuePolicy
fields.description: Whether queue and late-frame policy can be controlled.

fields.name: supportsOverlay
fields.description: Whether diagnostics overlay can be controlled.

fields.name: supportsStats
fields.description: Whether low-frequency flow diagnostics are reported.

fields.name: exposesExternalKeyframeRequest
fields.description: Whether a public keyframe request method is exposed; current draft keeps this false.

schemas.name: CastStatusCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for cast.status.

fields.name: sections
fields.description: Aggregate status sections the receiver can report.

fields.name: supportsSensitiveRedaction
fields.description: Whether sensitive status fields can be withheld and marked redacted.

fields.name: supportsStatusChangedEvent
fields.description: Whether low-frequency aggregate status change events are supported.

schemas.name: GetDeviceInfoParams
schemas.description: Optional selector for the read-only device information snapshot.

fields.name: includeCapabilitySummary
fields.description: Whether to include the lightweight DeviceCapabilitySummary block.

schemas.name: DeviceInfo
schemas.description: Read-only information snapshot for the current AXTP endpoint main device.

fields.name: product
fields.description: Brand, product type, model, and display information.

fields.name: software
fields.description: Installed or hosted software component summary.

fields.name: capability
fields.description: Lightweight modeling summary; not a complete capability registry.

schemas.name: DeviceIdentity
schemas.description: Stable identity fields for the current main device.

fields.name: deviceId
fields.description: Stable AXTP or business device identifier.

fields.name: serialNumber
fields.description: Vendor serial number; may be omitted by permission policy.

schemas.name: DeviceProduct
schemas.description: Product and user-visible model information.

fields.name: productType
fields.description: Product type; candidate values include windowsDevice, androidDevice, embeddedDevice, rtosDevice, cameraDevice, displayDevice, and unknown.

fields.name: displayName
fields.description: User-visible display name; this feature exposes it as read-only.

schemas.name: DeviceHardware
schemas.description: Hardware summary.

fields.name: cpuArch
fields.description: CPU architecture; candidate values include x86_64, arm64, armv7, riscv64, and unknown.

schemas.name: DeviceOs
schemas.description: Operating system summary.

fields.name: type
fields.description: OS type; candidate values include windows, android, linux, rtos, and unknown.

fields.name: arch
fields.description: OS architecture; candidate values include x86_64, arm64, armv7, riscv64, and unknown.

schemas.name: DeviceSoftware
schemas.description: Software component summary.

schemas.name: SoftwareComponent
schemas.description: One software component running on or hosted by the device.

fields.name: role
fields.description: Component role, such as axtpHost, launcher, signagePlayer, agent, or unknown.

schemas.name: DeviceAxtpRuntime
schemas.description: AXTP runtime summary.

schemas.name: DeviceCapabilitySummary
schemas.description: Lightweight capability modeling summary returned by device.getInfo.

fields.name: domains
fields.description: Domain names represented by the device.

fields.name: features
fields.description: Domain.feature names represented by the device.

fields.name: profiles
fields.description: Profile names or product profile hints.

schemas.name: DeviceInfoCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for device.info.

fields.name: readOnly
fields.description: device.info currently exposes only read-only information.

fields.name: identityMerged
fields.description: Whether device.identity has been merged into device.info.

schemas.name: DeviceGetPairingCodeParams
schemas.description: Request for device.getPairingCode; selects refresh behavior and the pairing code purpose.

fields.name: refresh
fields.description: Whether to force a fresh pairing code. false (default) returns the current valid code; true generates a new code and invalidates the previous one.

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Pairing code usage scenario; candidate values include initial_enrollment (first-time enrollment of a new device, default), re_enrollment (re-enrollment such as workspace migration), and service_repair (service/repair pairing, may have a different TTL or permission). Unsupported purpose returns NOT_SUPPORTED.

schemas.name: DevicePairingCodeInfo
schemas.description: Pairing code snapshot returned by device.getPairingCode. The code field carries a displayable or inputtable code; expiresAt is the authoritative absolute expiry while expiresInSeconds is retained for legacy device-sdk compatibility.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Displayable pairing code, 6-8 uppercase alphanumeric characters excluding confusable characters (0/O, 1/I/L); MUST match the regex ^[A-HJ-NP-Z2-9]{6,8}$.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.description: Absolute expiry time as an RFC 3339 timestamp. Authoritative when present. Legacy GetBindCode returned a Unix timestamp integer here; the adapter MUST convert integer to RFC 3339 string.

fields.name: expiresInSeconds
fields.description: Relative expiry in seconds, retained for legacy device-sdk compatibility (observed value 1800). MUST be greater than 0 when present.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Pairing code lifecycle state; candidate values include available (default), expired (TTL reached), used (consumed by the cloud), and disabled (revoked by the server).

schemas.name: DeviceGetEnrollmentStateParams
schemas.description: Request for device.getEnrollmentState; controls whether the post-enrollment endpoint summary is returned.

fields.name: includeEndpoint
fields.description: Whether to include the post-enrollment endpoint summary. Defaults to true since the most common caller (the cloud management backend) needs endpoint info; set to false for lightweight polling or when the endpoint is already cached.

schemas.name: DeviceEnrollmentInfo
schemas.description: Enrollment state snapshot. Shared by the device.getEnrollmentState result, DeviceSetEnrollmentStateResult.state, and DeviceEnrollmentStateChangedEvent.state. workspaceId, endpoint, and enrolledAt are populated only when state is enrolled or unenrolling.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current enrollment state; candidate values include unmanaged, pairing_available, pending, enrolled, failed, and unenrolling. Valid transitions follow the enrollment state machine; invalid transitions return INVALID_STATE.

fields.name: deviceId
fields.description: Server-assigned device identifier, stable across sessions.

fields.name: workspaceId
fields.description: Enrolled workspace identifier. Populated only when state is enrolled or unenrolling. Privacy-sensitive; exposure policy to be confirmed. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED] 待确认后走 amend

fields.name: endpoint
fields.description: Post-enrollment backend endpoint. Populated only when state is enrolled or unenrolling and subject to includeEndpoint.

fields.name: enrolledAt
fields.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the state became enrolled. Present only when state is enrolled or unenrolling. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent state update.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable detail, populated when state is failed or pending, optional when unenrolling.

schemas.name: DeviceEnrollmentEndpointSummary
schemas.description: Backend endpoint summary associated with enrollment. Nested in DeviceEnrollmentInfo and DeviceSetEnrollmentStateParams. When type is room, profileId is required.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Endpoint type; candidate values include room, device, and asset. Operations such as room.setName only allow type=room.

fields.name: displayName
fields.description: Endpoint display name, non-empty and trimmed. Max length aligned with device.info product.displayName (128) as a scoped default. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED] 待产品确认后走 amend

fields.name: profileId
fields.description: Room profile or business profile identifier. MUST be present when type is room; other types allow omission.

fields.name: workspaceId
fields.description: Endpoint workspace identifier. Takes precedence over the parent DeviceEnrollmentInfo.workspaceId when both are present. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

schemas.name: DeviceSetEnrollmentStateParams
schemas.description: Request for device.setEnrollmentState. Validation rules follow the enrollment state machine. For desiredState enrolled, only reachable from pending, endpoint and reason required, and endpoint.profileId required when endpoint.type is room. For desiredState unmanaged, reachable from enrolled/failed/pairing_available, reason recommended. For desiredState failed, only reachable from pending, message required. For desiredState pending, reachable from failed (retry) or pairing_available (code submitted). Transitions must follow the state machine; violations return INVALID_STATE.

fields.name: desiredState
fields.description: Target state; candidate values include enrolled, unmanaged, failed, and pending.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; candidate values include pairing_code_used, server_claimed, user_unenrolled, admin_reset, and unknown (default).

fields.name: endpoint
fields.description: Endpoint summary associated with a successful enrollment. Required when desiredState is enrolled.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Failure, unbind, or repair detail. Required when desiredState is failed.

schemas.name: DeviceSetEnrollmentStateResult
schemas.description: Result of device.setEnrollmentState; carries the post-operation enrollment snapshot.

fields.name: disconnectExpected
fields.description: Whether the unbind or reset is expected to cause a connection change. true only when desiredState is unmanaged and the device needs to close the management session; false for all other transitions.

schemas.name: DeviceEnrollmentStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload emitted when the enrollment state changes.

fields.name: previousState
fields.description: State enum value (not a full object) before the change; candidate values are the same DeviceEnrollmentInfo.state set.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; candidate values include pairing_code_used, server_claimed, user_unenrolled, admin_reset, and unknown (default).

fields.name: triggerMethod
fields.description: Operation type that triggered the change; candidate values include setEnrollmentState (explicit call), getPairingCode (indirect, for code-expiry fallback), and server_sync (device-internal such as code-expiry rollback or server-side revoke). triggerId MUST be omitted when triggerMethod is server_sync. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

fields.name: triggerId
fields.description: RPC request id of the triggering operation. Omitted when triggerMethod is server_sync. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

schemas.name: DeviceEnrollmentCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for device.enrollment.

fields.name: pairingCodeTtlSeconds
fields.description: Default code TTL in seconds; MUST be greater than 0.

fields.name: supportsUnenroll
fields.description: Whether remote unbind or enrollment state clear is supported.

fields.name: endpointTypes
fields.description: Endpoint type strings that enrollment may produce; candidate values include room, device, and asset. P0 only requires room. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

fields.name: supportedPurposes
fields.description: Supported pairing code purpose strings; candidate values include initial_enrollment, re_enrollment, and service_repair. Omission means only initial_enrollment is supported. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

fields.name: maxActivePairingCodes
fields.description: Maximum number of simultaneously valid pairing codes. Default 1. [REVIEW-ADOPTED-SCOPED]

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateCapabilities
schemas.description: P0 firmware update capability and upload constraints.

fields.name: supportsMultiFile
fields.description: Whether manifest may contain multiple files.

fields.name: autoReboot
fields.description: Whether the device automatically reboots after installation.

fields.name: maxChunkSize
fields.description: Maximum STREAM data chunk size supported by the device.

fields.name: devicePolicyVersion
fields.description: Optional device policy version used by host tooling.

schemas.name: BeginUpdateParams
schemas.description: Request to begin a firmware update session.

schemas.name: BeginUpdateResult
schemas.description: Result of creating a firmware update session.

schemas.name: FinishUpdateParams
schemas.description: Request to finish firmware upload and hand off processing to the device.

schemas.name: FinishUpdateResult
schemas.description: Result of finishUpdate.

fields.name: accepted
fields.description: Whether the device accepted the finish handoff.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State after finish, normally verifying or failed.

schemas.name: GetUpdateStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for firmware update state.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateManifest
schemas.description: Minimal firmware update manifest.

fields.name: devicePolicyVersion
fields.description: Optional policy version used to interpret the package.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateFile
schemas.description: One file in the firmware update manifest.

fields.name: md5
fields.description: File md5 digest as lowercase hexadecimal.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateStreamBinding
schemas.description: Binding between a manifest file and a STREAM streamId.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateState
schemas.description: Current firmware update state.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State, such as idle, receiving, verifying, installing, rebooting, confirmed, or failed.

fields.name: currentFileId
fields.description: Current file identifier, if file-level progress is available.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error details when state is failed.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateErrorInfo
schemas.description: Firmware update error details.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateProgressEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for firmware update progress.

schemas.name: FirmwareUpdateStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for firmware update state changes.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Error details when state is failed.

schemas.name: NetworkGetInterfacesParams
schemas.description: Selector for network interface enumeration.

fields.name: includeDisabled
fields.description: Whether disabled interfaces should be included.

schemas.name: NetworkGetInterfaceInfoParams
schemas.description: Selector for one network interface.

schemas.name: NetworkInterfaces
schemas.description: Network interface enumeration result.

fields.name: defaults
fields.description: Default interface identifiers for common roles.

schemas.name: NetworkDefaultInterfaceIds
schemas.description: Default network interface identifiers by role.

schemas.name: NetworkInterfaceSummary
schemas.description: Summary of one network interface.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Interface type; candidate values include ethernet, wifi, cellular, usb, virtual, and unknown.

schemas.name: NetworkInterfaceInfo
schemas.description: Detailed information for one network interface.

fields.name: macAddress
fields.description: Interface MAC address, if available and permitted.

fields.name: supportsIpConfig
fields.description: Whether this interface can be used with network.ip.

schemas.name: NetworkInterfaceState
schemas.description: Network interface administrative and link state.

fields.name: admin
fields.description: Administrative state; candidate values include up, down, disabled, and unknown.

fields.name: link
fields.description: Link state; candidate values include up, down, dormant, unknown.

schemas.name: NetworkGetIpConfigParams
schemas.description: Selector for IP configuration.

fields.name: interfaceId
fields.description: Interface identifier; omitted means default primary interface.

fields.name: family
fields.description: IP family; candidate values include ipv4 and ipv6.

schemas.name: NetworkSetIpConfigParams
schemas.description: IP configuration update request.

fields.name: applyPolicy
fields.description: Apply policy; candidate values include immediate and pending_restart.

schemas.name: NetworkSetIpConfigResult
schemas.description: Result of setting IP configuration.

fields.name: applyState
fields.description: Apply state; candidate values include applied, pending_restart, and failed.

schemas.name: NetworkIpConfig
schemas.description: IP configuration for one interface and address family.

fields.name: family
fields.description: IP family; candidate values include ipv4 and ipv6.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: IP mode; candidate values include dhcp, static, disabled, link_local, and unknown.

schemas.name: NetworkGetWifiCapabilitiesParams
schemas.description: Selector for Wi-Fi station capability.

schemas.name: NetworkGetWifiConfigParams
schemas.description: Selector for saved Wi-Fi configuration.

fields.name: includeProfiles
fields.description: Whether to include saved profile summaries.

schemas.name: NetworkGetWifiStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for Wi-Fi station runtime state.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiCapabilities
schemas.description: Wi-Fi station capability descriptor.

fields.name: credentialImportModes
fields.description: Supported credential import modes such as passphrase, pairing_token, and opaque_ref.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiConfig
schemas.description: Saved Wi-Fi profile summary.

fields.name: profiles
fields.description: NetworkWifiProfile summaries. Plaintext credentials must not be returned.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiProfile
schemas.description: Wi-Fi profile object used for station connection.

fields.name: securityType
fields.description: Security type, such as open, wpa2_psk, or wpa3_sae.

fields.name: credential
fields.description: Credential descriptor or secret reference. Responses must not expose plaintext secrets.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Profile source; candidate values include manual, pairing, migrated, and device_policy.

fields.name: persist
fields.description: Whether the profile should be persisted. This remains policy-controlled.

schemas.name: NetworkCredential
schemas.description: Credential descriptor or secret reference.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Credential type; candidate values include passphrase, pairing_token, opaque_ref, and none.

fields.name: secretRef
fields.description: Opaque reference to sensitive credential material.

fields.name: expiresInSeconds
fields.description: Relative validity lifetime for ephemeral credentials.

schemas.name: NetworkSetWifiConfigParams
schemas.description: Wi-Fi profile create or update request.

fields.name: replaceExisting
fields.description: Whether an existing matching profile may be replaced.

fields.name: makeDefault
fields.description: Whether to make this the default profile.

fields.name: connectAfterSave
fields.description: Whether to start connection after saving.

schemas.name: NetworkSetWifiConfigResult
schemas.description: Result of setting Wi-Fi profile configuration.

fields.name: connectStarted
fields.description: Whether connection was started after saving.

schemas.name: NetworkScanWifiParams
schemas.description: Wi-Fi scan request.

schemas.name: NetworkScanWifiResult
schemas.description: Wi-Fi scan result.

schemas.name: NetworkConnectWifiParams
schemas.description: Wi-Fi station connect request.

schemas.name: NetworkDisconnectWifiParams
schemas.description: Wi-Fi station disconnect request.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Disconnect reason; candidate values include user_request, profile_changed, shutdown, and unknown.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiActionResult
schemas.description: Result of a Wi-Fi connect or disconnect action.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current or target Wi-Fi state after accepting the action.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiState
schemas.description: Wi-Fi station runtime state.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State; candidate values include disabled, disconnected, scanning, authenticating, associating, connected, failed, and unknown.

fields.name: rssi
fields.description: Received signal strength indicator in dBm.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: Failure reason, if state is failed.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiScanResult
schemas.description: One Wi-Fi scan result.

schemas.name: NetworkGetApCapabilitiesParams
schemas.description: Selector for Wi-Fi AP capability.

schemas.name: NetworkGetApConfigParams
schemas.description: Selector for Wi-Fi AP configuration, state, or client list.

schemas.name: NetworkApCapabilities
schemas.description: Wi-Fi AP capability descriptor.

fields.name: clientsSupported
fields.description: Whether client list query and client change events are supported.

schemas.name: NetworkApConfig
schemas.description: Wi-Fi AP configuration.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether AP should be enabled by configuration.

fields.name: credential
fields.description: Credential descriptor; plaintext must not be returned unless policy explicitly allows it.

schemas.name: NetworkSetApConfigParams
schemas.description: Wi-Fi AP configuration update request.

fields.name: config
fields.description: AP configuration patch or target configuration.

schemas.name: NetworkSetApConfigResult
schemas.description: Result of setting Wi-Fi AP configuration.

fields.name: applyState
fields.description: Apply state; candidate values include applied, pending_restart, and failed.

schemas.name: NetworkApState
schemas.description: Wi-Fi AP runtime state.

fields.name: state
fields.description: AP state; candidate values include disabled, starting, enabled, stopping, failed, and unknown.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: Failure reason when state is failed.

schemas.name: NetworkApActionParams
schemas.description: Start or stop AP request.

schemas.name: NetworkApActionResult
schemas.description: Result of starting or stopping AP.

schemas.name: NetworkApClients
schemas.description: AP client list result.

schemas.name: NetworkApClientInfo
schemas.description: One AP client summary.

fields.name: macAddress
fields.description: Client MAC address, if available and permitted.

schemas.name: NetworkInterfaceStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for network interface state changes.

schemas.name: NetworkIpConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for IP configuration changes.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for Wi-Fi profile configuration changes.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for Wi-Fi station state changes.

schemas.name: NetworkWifiScanResultReportedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for asynchronous Wi-Fi scan results.

fields.name: complete
fields.description: Whether this event completes the scan.

schemas.name: NetworkApConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for Wi-Fi AP configuration changes.

schemas.name: NetworkApStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for Wi-Fi AP state changes.

schemas.name: NetworkApClientChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for Wi-Fi AP client changes.

fields.name: change
fields.description: Client change type; candidate values include joined, left, and updated.

schemas.name: NetworkInterfaceCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for network.interface.

schemas.name: NetworkIpCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for network.ip.

schemas.name: SignageGetPlaylistCapabilitiesParams
schemas.description: Empty request for signage.getPlaylistCapabilities; reads the full capability scope.

schemas.name: SignageGetPlaylistConfigParams
schemas.description: Empty request for signage.getPlaylistConfig; reads the full configuration.

schemas.name: SignageResetPlaylistConfigParams
schemas.description: Empty request for signage.resetPlaylistConfig; restores the full default configuration.

schemas.name: SignageSetPlaylistConfigResult
schemas.description: Empty success result for signage.setPlaylistConfig; carries only the standard success status. Callers confirm landing via getPlaylistConfig or the playlistConfigChanged event.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistCapabilitiesResult
schemas.description: Capability scope for signage.playlist.

fields.name: supportedItemTypes
fields.description: Supported playlist item type strings; candidate values include image, website, video, clock, and unsplash.

fields.name: maxItemsPerPlaylist
fields.description: Maximum number of playlist items per playlist; product-defined.

fields.name: supportsUrlRefresh
fields.description: Whether playlist item URL refresh (getPlaylistItemUrl) is supported.

fields.name: supportsReset
fields.description: Whether resetting the playlist to default (resetPlaylistConfig) is supported.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistConfigResult
schemas.description: Current playlist configuration snapshot.

fields.name: playlists
fields.description: Playlist objects. An empty array means no playlist is configured and is not an error.

schemas.name: SignageSetPlaylistConfigParams
schemas.description: Full replacement payload for signage.setPlaylistConfig.

fields.name: playlists
fields.description: Playlist objects. MUST be non-empty; an empty array returns INVALID_ARGUMENT.

schemas.name: SignageGetPlaylistItemUrlParams
schemas.description: Request to refresh a playlist item URL by itemId.

schemas.name: SignageGetPlaylistItemUrlResult
schemas.description: Refreshed playlist item URL result. The internal structure of settings depends on type.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Playlist item type used to discriminate the settings structure; candidate values include image, video, website, and unsplash. Clock is excluded from URL refresh.

fields.name: settings
fields.description: Refreshed complete settings; the device may replace the locally cached settings with this value.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload emitted when the playlist configuration changes.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; candidate values include set_config (triggered by setPlaylistConfig) and reset_config (triggered by resetPlaylistConfig).

fields.name: playlists
fields.description: Optional playlist objects representing the full post-change configuration. The device MAY omit it to shrink the payload; when omitted the client MUST call signage.getPlaylistConfig to reconcile.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylist
schemas.description: One playlist definition.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Playlist type; candidate values include default (always-on default playlist) and scheduled (time-windowed playlist).

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required only when type is scheduled; MUST satisfy startDate <= endDate.

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required only when type is scheduled; MUST satisfy startDate <= endDate.

fields.name: startTime
fields.description: Start time (HH:mm:ss). Required only when type is scheduled. When startDate equals endDate, startTime MUST be <= endTime; when startDate < endDate, crossing midnight is allowed (startTime > endTime means D-day startTime to D+1 endTime).

fields.name: endTime
fields.description: End time (HH:mm:ss). Required only when type is scheduled; see startTime for the cross-midnight rule.

fields.name: days
fields.description: Optional active weekday numbers (1-7, 1=Monday). Required only when type is scheduled and MUST be non-empty.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Playlist item objects. MUST be non-empty; an empty items array returns INVALID_ARGUMENT.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistItem
schemas.description: One playlist item.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Playlist item type; candidate values include image, website, video, clock, and unsplash.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Single playback duration in seconds; MUST be greater than 0.

fields.name: sort
fields.description: Playback order, ascending by sort. The sort value MUST be unique within the same playlist; duplicate sort values return INVALID_ARGUMENT.

fields.name: settings
fields.description: Playlist item settings; structure varies by type.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistItemSettings
schemas.description: Aggregated playlist item settings spanning all item types. Only the subset matching the enclosing item type is meaningful; see the per-type rules in the signage.playlist draft.

fields.name: delaySeconds
fields.description: image and unsplash types: per-image display interval in seconds.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.description: image, video, and unsplash types: Unix timestamp URL expiry. 0 or absent means never expires.

fields.name: url
fields.description: video and website types: media or page URL.

fields.name: muted
fields.description: video type: whether to play muted.

fields.name: ignoreCertificateError
fields.description: website type: whether to ignore TLS certificate errors. Enabling bypasses certificate validation and carries MITM risk; the default policy and caller permission requirements are product-defined.

fields.name: refreshIntervalSecs
fields.description: website type: page refresh interval in seconds. 0 or absent means no refresh.

fields.name: clocks
fields.description: clock type: non-empty playlist clock entry objects.

fields.name: photos
fields.description: unsplash type: non-empty playlist unsplash photo objects.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistClockEntry
schemas.description: One clock entry for the clock item type.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistUnsplashPhoto
schemas.description: One Unsplash photo entry, including photographer attribution.

schemas.name: SignagePlaylistCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for signage.playlist.

fields.name: supportedItemTypes
fields.description: Supported playlist item type strings; candidate values include image, website, video, clock, and unsplash.

fields.name: maxItemsPerPlaylist
fields.description: Maximum number of playlist items per playlist; product-defined.

fields.name: supportsUrlRefresh
fields.description: Whether playlist item URL refresh is supported.

fields.name: supportsReset
fields.description: Whether resetting the playlist to default is supported.

schemas.name: SoftwareGetConfigParams
schemas.description: Request for software.getConfig; selects the software object to read by target.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object to read. Currently defined value is launcher; other values such as signagePlayer and agent are reserved for future adoption and their config fields are not defined in this version.

schemas.name: SoftwareConfig
schemas.description: Runtime configuration snapshot of a software object. For the launcher target, config carries the LauncherConfig structure (displayName and appearance).

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object this configuration belongs to. Currently defined value is launcher.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Target-specific configuration fragment. For the launcher target this is the LauncherConfig structure (displayName plus appearance); see the LauncherConfig and LauncherAppearance schemas.

schemas.name: SoftwareSetConfigParams
schemas.description: Request for software.setConfig; applies a partial update to the target software object. Fields absent from config are left unchanged; config itself must be a valid object and does not accept null.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Target-specific configuration fragment to apply (partial update). For the launcher target this is the LauncherConfig structure; see SoftwareConfig.config and LauncherAppearance.

schemas.name: SoftwareResetConfigParams
schemas.description: Request for software.resetConfig; restores the specified software object to its current-version defaults.

schemas.name: SoftwareSetConfigResult
schemas.description: Empty success result for software.setConfig; carries only the standard success status. Callers confirm landing via software.getConfig or the software.configChanged event.

schemas.name: SoftwareConfigChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload emitted when a software object configuration changes.

fields.name: config
fields.description: Full post-change configuration fragment (not a patch). For the launcher target this is the LauncherConfig structure; see SoftwareConfig.config.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Optional changed field paths using dot notation for nested levels, e.g. appearance.panelLayout. Omitted when the device cannot compute the diff.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; candidate values include user_request (triggered by setConfig), restore_default (triggered by resetConfig), device_policy (triggered by device-internal policy), and unknown (default when the reason is not reported).

schemas.name: LauncherConfig
schemas.description: Configuration fragment for target launcher. Referenced by SoftwareConfig.config, SoftwareSetConfigParams.config, and SoftwareConfigChangedEvent.config when target is launcher.

fields.name: displayName
fields.description: User-visible device display name. Overrides the device factory name returned read-only by device.info product.displayName. MUST be non-empty; an empty string or value exceeding the max length returns INVALID_ARGUMENT. Omitted means keep current value on set, or the device factory name on get/reset.

fields.name: appearance
fields.description: Appearance configuration for the launcher panel.

schemas.name: LauncherAppearance
schemas.description: Appearance configuration for the launcher panel, nested under LauncherConfig.appearance.

fields.name: panelLayout
fields.description: Panel layout mode; candidate values are focus (focus mode) and sidebar (sidebar mode, default).

fields.name: autoHidePanel
fields.description: Whether to auto-hide the panel. Default is false.

fields.name: autoHideDelay
fields.description: Auto-hide delay in seconds; MUST be greater than 0. Only effective when autoHidePanel is true. The value is preserved and persisted even when autoHidePanel is false and takes effect again once autoHidePanel switches back to true.

schemas.name: SoftwareConfigCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for software.config.

fields.name: supportedTargets
fields.description: Supported software object target strings; candidate values include launcher, signagePlayer, and agent.

fields.name: supportsReset
fields.description: Whether restoring defaults via resetConfig is supported.

fields.name: resetMayRestartSoftware
fields.description: Whether reset may restart the software object (not the device). System-level factory reset is handled by system.restoreFactorySettings.

schemas.name: SoftwareGetUpdatePolicyParams
schemas.description: Request for software.getUpdatePolicy; selects the software object to read by target.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object to read the update policy of. Currently defined value is launcher; other values such as signagePlayer and agent are reserved for future adoption and their policy fields are not defined in this version.

schemas.name: SoftwareUpdatePolicy
schemas.description: Update policy snapshot of a software object. For the launcher target, policy carries the LauncherUpdatePolicy structure (updateMode, schedule, channel, conditions). When target is launcher, schedule and conditions may be null to explicitly clear the time window or prerequisites; null is distinct from omitted.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object this update policy belongs to.

fields.name: policy
fields.description: Target-specific update policy fragment. For the launcher target this is the LauncherUpdatePolicy structure (updateMode plus schedule, channel, conditions); see the LauncherUpdatePolicy, UpdateSchedule, and UpdateConditions schemas.

schemas.name: SoftwareSetUpdatePolicyParams
schemas.description: Request for software.setUpdatePolicy; applies a partial update to the target software object. Fields absent from policy are left unchanged; policy itself must be a valid object and does not accept null. Within the launcher policy fragment, schedule null explicitly clears the time window and conditions null explicitly clears all prerequisites; omitted means keep current value.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object to configure the update policy of.

fields.name: policy
fields.description: Target-specific update policy fragment to apply (partial update). For the launcher target this is the LauncherUpdatePolicy structure; see SoftwareUpdatePolicy.policy. Within the fragment, schedule null or conditions null explicitly clears those sub-objects while omitted keeps them unchanged.

schemas.name: SoftwareResetUpdatePolicyParams
schemas.description: Request for software.resetUpdatePolicy; restores the specified software object update policy to its current-version defaults.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object to reset the update policy of.

schemas.name: SoftwareSetUpdatePolicyResult
schemas.description: Empty success result for software.setUpdatePolicy; carries only the standard success status. Callers confirm landing via software.getUpdatePolicy or the software.updatePolicyChanged event.

schemas.name: SoftwareUpdatePolicyChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload emitted when a software object update policy changes.

fields.name: target
fields.description: Software object whose update policy changed.

fields.name: policy
fields.description: Full post-change update policy fragment (not a patch). For the launcher target this is the LauncherUpdatePolicy structure; see SoftwareUpdatePolicy.policy.

fields.name: changedFields
fields.description: Optional changed field paths using dot notation for nested levels, e.g. schedule.start. Omitted when the device cannot compute the diff.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Change reason; candidate values include user_request (triggered by setUpdatePolicy), restore_default (triggered by resetUpdatePolicy), device_policy (triggered by device-internal policy), and unknown (default when the reason is not reported).

schemas.name: LauncherUpdatePolicy
schemas.description: Update policy fragment for target launcher. Referenced by SoftwareUpdatePolicy.policy, SoftwareSetUpdatePolicyParams.policy, and SoftwareUpdatePolicyChangedEvent.policy when target is launcher. schedule null means no update time restriction (any time) and conditions null means no prerequisites; both are valid persisted values and the reset default sets both to null. When updateMode is manual or notify, schedule may still be set and persisted but the device does not automatically perform updates in the window; the schedule value is preserved across updateMode changes.

fields.name: updateMode
fields.description: Update behavior mode; candidate values are auto (fully automatic download and install), manual (manual trigger only), and notify (notify only when an update is available).

fields.name: schedule
fields.description: Automatic update time window. Only effective when updateMode is auto. null means no time restriction (any time of day). In setUpdatePolicy partial update, null explicitly clears the window while omitted keeps the current value. See UpdateSchedule.

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Update channel; candidate values are release (stable), beta (test), and alpha (development).

fields.name: conditions
fields.description: Automatic update prerequisites. null means no prerequisites (no restriction). In setUpdatePolicy partial update, null explicitly clears all conditions while omitted keeps the current value. See UpdateConditions.

schemas.name: UpdateSchedule
schemas.description: Automatic update time window, nested under LauncherUpdatePolicy.schedule.

fields.name: start
fields.description: Window start time in local time, matching the regex ^([01]\d|2[0-3]):[0-5]\d$ (HH:mm). A value that does not match returns INVALID_ARGUMENT.

fields.name: end
fields.description: Window end time in local time, matching the regex ^([01]\d|2[0-3]):[0-5]\d$ (HH:mm). A value that does not match returns INVALID_ARGUMENT. When end is earlier than start it denotes a cross-midnight window (from start on the current day to end on the next day).

fields.name: timezone
fields.description: IANA timezone ID. Omitted means the device local timezone.

schemas.name: UpdateConditions
schemas.description: Automatic update prerequisites, nested under LauncherUpdatePolicy.conditions.

fields.name: requireIdle
fields.description: Whether the device must be idle before performing an update.

fields.name: requireWifi
fields.description: Whether updates may only be downloaded over a Wi-Fi network.

schemas.name: SoftwareUpdatePolicyCapability
schemas.description: Capability descriptor for software.updatePolicy.

fields.name: supportedTargets
fields.description: Supported software object target strings; candidate values include launcher, signagePlayer, and agent.

fields.name: supportedChannels
fields.description: Optional supported update channel strings; candidate values include release, beta, and alpha.

fields.name: supportsSchedule
fields.description: Whether configuring an update time window via schedule is supported.

fields.name: supportsReset
fields.description: Whether restoring defaults via resetUpdatePolicy is supported.

schemas.name: VideoGetStreamCapabilitiesParams
schemas.description: Selector for video stream capability.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Optional video source identifier; omit to query all visible sources.

fields.name: includeRuntimeState
fields.description: Whether to include current source runtime state.

schemas.name: VideoStreamCapabilities
schemas.description: Device-level video.stream capability summary.

fields.name: openModes
fields.description: Supported open modes, such as producer_open and receiver_pull.

fields.name: peerRoles
fields.description: Peer roles, such as receiver and transmitter.

fields.name: supportsSyncGroup
fields.description: Whether video streams can share a synchronization group with audio streams.

fields.name: flowControlManagedByRuntime
fields.description: Whether normal applications can rely on runtime-managed STREAM flow control.

schemas.name: VideoStreamSource
schemas.description: One real-time video stream source.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Runtime source state, such as available, receiving, stopped, or unavailable.

schemas.name: VideoOpenStreamParams
schemas.description: Request to open a real-time video stream.

fields.name: peerRole
fields.description: Requested peer media role; values include receiver and transmitter.

fields.name: codec
fields.description: Requested video codec, such as h264, h265, mjpeg, or raw.

fields.name: cursorUnit
fields.description: STREAM cursor unit, such as timestampUs or frameIndex.

fields.name: maxDataSize
fields.description: Preferred maximum STREAM payload data size.

schemas.name: VideoOpenStreamResult
schemas.description: Result of opening a real-time video stream.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Initial state, normally opening or streaming.

fields.name: maxDataSize
fields.description: Negotiated maximum STREAM payload data size.

schemas.name: VideoCloseStreamParams
schemas.description: Request to close a video stream.

schemas.name: VideoCloseStreamResult
schemas.description: Result of closing a video stream.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Close state, such as closing, closed, or failed.

fields.name: alreadyClosed
fields.description: Whether the stream was already terminal before this request.

schemas.name: VideoGetStreamStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for a video stream state query.

schemas.name: VideoStreamState
schemas.description: Runtime state of one video stream.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Stream state, such as opening, streaming, closing, closed, or failed.

fields.name: keyFrameRequested
fields.description: Whether a key frame has been requested and is pending.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: Failure reason when state is failed.

schemas.name: VideoGetStreamSourceStateParams
schemas.description: Selector for video source runtime state.

schemas.name: VideoStreamSourceState
schemas.description: Runtime state of a video stream source.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Source state, such as unavailable, available, receiving, stopped, or failed.

fields.name: available
fields.description: Whether the source is available for openStream.

fields.name: activeStreamId
fields.description: Active downstream stream id, if any.

schemas.name: VideoRequestKeyFrameParams
schemas.description: Request a key frame for an active video stream.

schemas.name: VideoRequestKeyFrameResult
schemas.description: Result of a key frame request.

schemas.name: VideoStreamStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for video stream state changes.

schemas.name: VideoStreamSourceStateChangedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for video stream source state changes.

fields.name: activeStreamId
fields.description: Active downstream stream id, if any.

schemas.name: VideoStreamStatsReportedEvent
schemas.description: Event payload for video stream statistics reports.

schemas.name: VideoStreamStats
schemas.description: Bounded runtime statistics for a video stream.

fields.name: bytes
fields.description: Number of STREAM payload bytes observed.
